# A Precious Rock
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=A%20Precious%20Rock&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = A Precious Rock
| desc = A goldish gem, stuck in a pile of rubble, attracting anyone who lays their eyes upon it
| slot = trap
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| cost = 60
| damage = 220,160
| radius = 10,4
| triggerradius =5,2 
| armtime = 6,10
| cooldown = 2
| fameb = 7
| bonuses = {{Stat|att|6}}{{Stat|dex|6}}{{Stat|def|-12}}
| effects = yes
| slowed = (large)5
| paralysed = (small)1
| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by 
}}
<noinclude>
{{NavTraps}}
</noinclude>
